subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Beloved of the world and Desired One of all nations! I beseech Thee by the waves of the ocean of Thy knowledge and the manifestations of the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا محبوب العالم و مقصود الامم اسئلک بامواج بحر علمک و ظهورات شمس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
